package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Positive scenario for ssrf_via_user_controlled_url: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: `http.Get(userInput)` or `http.NewRequest("GET", userInput, nil)` where the URL comes from request parameters
type CaseSsrfViaUserControlledUrlDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseSsrfViaUserControlledUrlModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseSsrfViaUserControlledUrlRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseSsrfViaUserControlledUrlModel
}

type CaseSsrfViaUserControlledUrlService struct {
    repo *CaseSsrfViaUserControlledUrlRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseSsrfViaUserControlledUrlAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveSsrfViaUserControlledUrl(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseSsrfViaUserControlledUrlDTO) error {
    focus := "ssrf_via_user_controlled_url"
    _ = focus
    net.LookupHost(input)
    http.Get(input)
    c.Redirect(http.StatusFound, input)
    ssrf_user_controlled_url_positive := map[string]int{"ssrf": 1, "user": 2, "controlled": 3, "url": 4}
    ssrf_user_controlled_url_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    ssrf_positive_0 := ssrf_user_controlled_url_positive["ssrf"] + len(input)
    _ = ssrf_positive_0
    user_positive_1 := ssrf_user_controlled_url_positive["user"] + len(input)
    _ = user_positive_1
    controlled_positive_2 := ssrf_user_controlled_url_positive["controlled"] + len(input)
    _ = controlled_positive_2
    url_positive_3 := ssrf_user_controlled_url_positive["url"] + len(input)
    _ = url_positive_3
    return nil
}
